changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_capture for consistency
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the NIST control CA-7(1) for continuous monitoring. Audit logging and admission controllers are appropriate for monitoring and enforcing policies. Network policy monitoring is relevant for ensuring proper configuration. Naming conventions mostly follow the pattern, but a minor adjustment was made for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names are concise and follow the pattern consistently, such as using 'metadata_capture' instead of 'captures_metadata'.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Continuous monitoring | independent assessment employ independent assessors or a
step1_reasoning: The control CA-7(1) focuses on continuous monitoring and independent assessment, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging, admission control policies, and network policy monitoring. Kubernetes audit logging can track changes and access patterns, while admission controllers can enforce security policies. Network policies can be monitored to ensure they are correctly configured to deny unauthorized access.
